h2.note: transcript-level proxy for the per-turn H2 (§4.3); needs a real (non-mock) full-N run to mean anything

cliIsolation.claude: non-persistent temp cwd with project/local settings and tools disabled

scored.statedInsightEvidence: I think I can list the pairs, but I still have to remind myself that the header is just the slot label, not the row's rainfall fact.
scored.naiveTrajectory: The learner is expected to continue restating the header/cell-value pairs with diminishing residual confusion until the distinction is fully settled.
scored.tutorReversalEvidence: Use-test before resubmitting: in `Chicago | 82 | March`, `rainfall_mm` is used to locate the rainfall slot; `82` is copied from the row as the rainfall value.
scored.tutorReversalJustification: The tutor adds a 'use-test' framing in T2 that slightly shifts from pure definition to functional application, but this is a narrowing of the same route rather than a stock-taking contrast plus a genuinely new mechanism, so it cannot score above 3.
scored.tutorAdaptationJustification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no later tutor turn that could adapt to a revised learner framing.

tutor_contingent_adaptation.justification: There is no pivot learner turn, so there is no later tutor turn that could adapt to a revised learner framing.
